syntax_6640.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6640.title: Map State
syntax_6640.description: represents a state of a map that can be sent to the player to display changes on a map, useful as it is faster than drawing images often on a map

en: represents a state of a map that can be sent to the player to display changes on a map, useful as it is faster than drawing images often on a map

syntax_6632.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6632.title: texture of skin
syntax_6632.description: get or set the value and signature of a skin

en: get or set the value and signature of a skin

syntax_6607.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6607.title: Map State Map
syntax_6607.description: Allows you to get or change the map of a map state to be played on different maps
syntax_6607.syntax_pattern:
[map] id of map state[s] %mapstates%
map state %mapstates%'[s] [map] id

en: Allows you to get or change the map of a map state to be played on different maps

syntax_6554.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6554.title: On Map initialize
syntax_6554.description: event gets called when a map is created for the first time and starts to render, eg. map from world expression or player getting a filled map for the first time

en: event gets called when a map is created for the first time and starts to render, eg. map from world expression or player getting a filled map for the first time

syntax_6606.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6606.title: Map State
syntax_6606.description: returns a map state that can be sent to a player
syntax_6606.syntax_pattern:
map state (of|from) %mapcanvases%
map state of %images% [at [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)]] on %map%

en: returns a map state that can be sent to a player

syntax_6605.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6605.title: Map Scale / Center / Id
syntax_6605.description: returns the scale, center x or z location, or id of a map

en: returns the scale, center x or z location, or id of a map

syntax_6634.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6634.title: FluidCollisionMode
syntax_6634.description:
Represents the fluid collision mode in a raytrace
always - collide with all fluids
never - ignore fluids
source_only - collide with source fluid blocks only

en:
Represents the fluid collision mode in a raytrace
always - collide with all fluids
never - ignore fluids
source_only - collide with source fluid blocks only

syntax_6635.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6635.title: Image
syntax_6635.description: represents an image. Can be used to send as chat message, upload skins or be displayed on maps

en: represents an image. Can be used to send as chat message, upload skins or be displayed on maps

syntax_6636.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6636.title: Map
syntax_6636.description: represents a map view with an id

en: represents a map view with an id

syntax_6637.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6637.title: Map Canvas
syntax_6637.description: the canvas of a map, this is what allows you to set pixels on

en: the canvas of a map, this is what allows you to set pixels on

syntax_6638.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6638.title: Map Cursor
syntax_6638.description: represents a cursor in a map

en: represents a cursor in a map

syntax_6639.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6639.title: Map Cursor Type
syntax_6639.description: represents the type of a map cursor
syntax_6639.type_usage: white pointer, green pointer, red pointer, blue pointer, white cross, red marker, white circle, small white circle, mansion, temple, banner white, banner orange, banner magenta, banner light blue, banner yellow, banner lime, banner pink, banner gray, banner light gray, banner cyan, banner purple, banner blue, banner brown, banner green, banner red, banner black, red x

en: represents the type of a map cursor
Represent the raytrace

syntax_6642.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6642.title: Skin
syntax_6642.description: represents the skin of a player, skull block or skull item

en: represents the skin of a player, skull block or skull item

syntax_6555.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6555.title: On Stats change
syntax_6555.description: Called when a player statistic changes value. event-number returns the change amount while past and future event-number returns the value before and after the event
syntax_6555.event_values: past event-number, event-itemstack, event-player, event-entitydata, event-number, event-world, future event-number

en: Called when a player statistic changes value. event-number returns the change amount while past and future event-number returns the value before and after the event

syntax_6556.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6556.title: Bounding Box intersect
syntax_6556.description: Checks whether a bounding box intersects with another, fully contains another, or contains positions
syntax_6556.syntax_pattern:
[[bounding] box] %boundingbox% [(does(n't| not))] (fully contain[s]|intersect[s][ with]) %boundingboxes%
[[bounding] box] %boundingbox% (contain|does(n't| not) contain)[s] %vectors%

en: Checks whether a bounding box intersects with another, fully contains another, or contains positions

syntax_6557.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6557.title: Map is Virtual
syntax_6557.description: whether the map is managed by a plugin or is a natural minecraft map

en: whether the map is managed by a plugin or is a natural minecraft map
deletes skript

syntax_6560.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6560.title: Edit Bounding Box
syntax_6560.description: move or expand a bounding box

en: move or expand a bounding box

syntax_6564.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6564.title: Gif
syntax_6564.description: saves a gif to a variable, saving to `{_gif::*}` will result in {_gif::*} containing the images and {_gif::delay::*} containing the delays (timespan)

en: saves a gif to a variable, saving to `{_gif::*}` will result in {_gif::*} containing the images and {_gif::delay::*} containing the delays (timespan)

syntax_6566.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6566.title: Image edit
syntax_6566.syntax_pattern:
draw [a] %color% ([(outline of [a])] (rectangle|oval)|line) (between|from) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] (and|to) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] on %image%
(clear|crop) area (between|from) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] (and|to) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] on %image%
draw image %image% at [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] on image %image%

en: Some basic image editing features

syntax_6569.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6569.title: Map Draw
syntax_6569.description:
draw text or image on a map.
for draw text, map colors are in the format §<number>; however you can still use hex and regular color codes and it will convert for you
for draw image, only part of the image will be displayed if it goes over the 128 pixel size. You can use the image expression to resize

en:
draw text or image on a map.
for draw text, map colors are in the format §<number>; however you can still use hex and regular color codes and it will convert for you
for draw image, only part of the image will be displayed if it goes over the 128 pixel size. You can use the image expression to resize

syntax_6570.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6570.title: Map stop editing
syntax_6570.description: removes the changes you have made to a map. note that the map will only revert to its original state if you partially edited it.

en: removes the changes you have made to a map. note that the map will only revert to its original state if you partially edited it.

syntax_6574.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6574.title: Update inventory
syntax_6574.description: updates a player's inventory. Useful to get rid of ghost items

en: updates a player's inventory. Useful to get rid of ghost items

syntax_6575.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6575.title: Wait for render
syntax_6575.description:
waits until the specified canvas is rendered again. Renders happen almost every tick.
Useful when you want every action to be seen.
syntax_6575.syntax_pattern:
wait for [next] render
wait for %mapcanv% to render

en:
waits until the specified canvas is rendered again. Renders happen almost every tick.
Useful when you want every action to be seen.

syntax_6576.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6576.title: Bounding Box Blocks
syntax_6576.description: returns blocks within a bounding box given a world

en: returns blocks within a bounding box given a world

syntax_6577.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6577.title: Bounding Box Entities
syntax_6577.description: gets entities within a bounding box

en: gets entities within a bounding box

syntax_6578.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6578.title: Bounding Box Points
syntax_6578.description: Get the upper, lower or centre point of a bounding box

en: Get the upper, lower or centre point of a bounding box

syntax_6579.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6579.title: Bounding Box outline
syntax_6579.description: Returns a list of vectors in the outline or corner of a bounding box and line between vectors or locations
syntax_6579.syntax_pattern:
[vector] box outline of %boundingboxes% [with density %number%]
vector line between %vector% and %vector% [with density %number%]
location line between %location% and %location% [with density %number%]
[all] [corner] points of %boundingboxes%

en: Returns a list of vectors in the outline or corner of a bounding box and line between vectors or locations

syntax_6580.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6580.title: Convert
syntax_6580.description:
Used for converting variables to their types to allow changes since you cannot do things like set {_block} to air when the variable is a block
can also be used to filter out a specific type from a list

en:
Used for converting variables to their types to allow changes since you cannot do things like set {_block} to air when the variable is a block
can also be used to filter out a specific type from a list

syntax_6573.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6573.title: Show Map State
syntax_6573.description: sends a map state to a player

en: sends a map state to a player

syntax_6572.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6572.title: Pause Chat
syntax_6572.description: prevents a player from receiving chat messages from the server

en: prevents a player from receiving chat messages from the server

syntax_6571.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6571.title: Move entity
syntax_6571.description:
Similar to teleporting but keeps their momentum and works even if there are passengers on the entity
the location must be in the same world as the entity

en:
Similar to teleporting but keeps their momentum and works even if there are passengers on the entity
the location must be in the same world as the entity
makes the specified entities jump

syntax_6567.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6567.title: Image from skin
syntax_6567.description: retrieves an image from a skin and saves to a variable

en: retrieves an image from a skin and saves to a variable

syntax_6565.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6565.title: Hide Entity
syntax_6565.description:
Hides entities for specific or all players
will be unhidden if player relogs or goes far away
hiding a player from themselves will do weird things

en:
Hides entities for specific or all players
will be unhidden if player relogs or goes far away
hiding a player from themselves will do weird things

syntax_6563.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6563.title: Generate Skin
syntax_6563.description: creates a skin from an image or loads from an offline player and saves to a variable

en: creates a skin from an image or loads from an offline player and saves to a variable

syntax_6562.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6562.title: Entity Animation
syntax_6562.description: make en entity go in riptide or interact with their hand animation
syntax_6562.syntax_pattern:
play (riptide|(off|main)[ ]hand interact) animation on %livingentities%[ for %players%]
stop entity animation of %livingentities%[ for %players%]

en: make en entity go in riptide or interact with their hand animation

syntax_6581.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6581.title: Create Bounding Box
syntax_6581.description: Creates a bounding box, bounding box of block may not be accurate for blocks like stairs, however collision shape returns a list of bounding boxes representing the exact shape, read [this](https://github.com/MrsDarth/skirt/wiki/BoundingBox) for more info.
syntax_6581.syntax_pattern:
(bounding|hit)[ ]box of %entities%
(bounding|hit)[ ]box of %blocks%
collision shape of %blocks%
[new] bounding box (from|between|within) %vector/location% (and|to) %vector/location%
[new] bounding box (with centre|at) %vector/location% [with dimensions] [x] %number%, [y] %number%, [z] %number%
%boundingboxes% [with all directions] expanded by %number%
intersection [box] (between|of) %boundingbox% and %boundingbox%

en: Creates a bounding box, bounding box of block may not be accurate for blocks like stairs, however collision shape returns a list of bounding boxes representing the exact shape, read [this](https://github.com/MrsDarth/skirt/wiki/BoundingBox) for more info.

syntax_6582.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6582.title: Custom Inventory Name
syntax_6582.description: get or change the name of a custom inventory. May not work for real inventories
syntax_6582.syntax_pattern:
[the] custom inventory name of %inventories%
%inventories%'[s] custom inventory name

en: get or change the name of a custom inventory. May not work for real inventories

syntax_6583.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6583.title: Drops of entity
syntax_6583.description: generates the drops of an entity with an optional attacker. This takes into account the looting of the player's tool and luck potion effect

en: generates the drops of an entity with an optional attacker. This takes into account the looting of the player's tool and luck potion effect

syntax_6585.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6585.title: Enchantment Type level
syntax_6585.description: returns the level of an enchantment type. enchantment level of sharpness 10 returns 10

en: returns the level of an enchantment type. enchantment level of sharpness 10 returns 10

syntax_6586.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6586.title: Entity Direction
syntax_6586.description: Returns the direction of an entity or location as a vector, similar to vector from location's yaw and pitch. Can be set

en: Returns the direction of an entity or location as a vector, similar to vector from location's yaw and pitch. Can be set

syntax_6587.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6587.title: Exact target block
syntax_6587.description: returns the exact target block of a living entity, accounting for partial blocks such as stairs and doors

en: returns the exact target block of a living entity, accounting for partial blocks such as stairs and doors

syntax_6588.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6588.title: Falling Block
syntax_6588.description: returns a falling block entity type with the specified block. Works for tile entities as well

en: returns a falling block entity type with the specified block. Works for tile entities as well

syntax_6589.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6589.title: Falling Block Data
syntax_6589.description: gets the block data or itemtype of a falling block

en: gets the block data or itemtype of a falling block

syntax_6591.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6591.title: Glowing item
syntax_6591.description:
returns a glowing item
empty enchants instead of enchanting and hiding flags

en:
returns a glowing item
empty enchants instead of enchanting and hiding flags

syntax_6592.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6592.title: Image
syntax_6592.description: get an image from a file, url, folder
syntax_6592.syntax_pattern:
[new] image from (file [path]|url) %string%
images (from|in) folder %string%
%images% (resized|scaled)[ (to|by) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)]]
%images% flipped (horizontally|vertically)
sub[ ]image of %images% from [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] to [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)]
new (blank|empty|) image [with dimensions [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)]]

en: get an image from a file, url, folder

syntax_6593.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6593.title: Image pixel
syntax_6593.description: get or set a pixel on an image to a color

en: get or set a pixel on an image to a color

syntax_6594.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6594.title: Image to color text
syntax_6594.description: turns image pixels to hex color to display in chat

en: turns image pixels to hex color to display in chat

syntax_6595.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6595.title: Image width / height
syntax_6595.description: returns the width or height of an image

en: returns the width or height of an image

syntax_6596.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6596.title: Item Frame Properties
syntax_6596.description:
Get or set an item frame's:
rotation - the rotation of the item in the frame
facing - the direction of the item frame itself
fixed state - whether the item frame can be destroyed by regular means
visibility - whether players can see the item frame

en:
Get or set an item frame's:
rotation - the rotation of the item in the frame
facing - the direction of the item frame itself
fixed state - whether the item frame can be destroyed by regular means
visibility - whether players can see the item frame

syntax_6597.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6597.title: Item from map
syntax_6597.description: returns a filled map item with the specified map

en: returns a filled map item with the specified map

syntax_6598.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6598.title: ItemType with Type
syntax_6598.description: returns a copy of an item with another type keeps all information such as lore

en: returns a copy of an item with another type keeps all information such as lore

syntax_6599.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6599.title: Last Edited Canvas
syntax_6599.description: returns the last edited map after or within a map edit section

en: returns the last edited map after or within a map edit section

syntax_6600.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6600.title: List Index
syntax_6600.description: gets the index of an element in a list
syntax_6600.syntax_pattern:
[(first|last)] [(variable)] index of %object% in %objects%
[all] [(variable)] ind(ex|ic)es of %object% in %objects%

en: gets the index of an element in a list

syntax_6601.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6601.title: Map
syntax_6601.description: used to get a map from an id or a newly created map from specified world

en: used to get a map from an id or a newly created map from specified world

syntax_6602.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6602.title: Map Cursor Properties
syntax_6602.description: the properties of a map cursor, can be changed

en: the properties of a map cursor, can be changed

syntax_6603.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6603.title: Map Cursors
syntax_6603.description: returns the map cursors of a map canvas. Can be set, add, remove, reset, delete

en: returns the map cursors of a map canvas. Can be set, add, remove, reset, delete

syntax_6604.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6604.title: Map Pixels
syntax_6604.description:
returns pixels of map, can be set to a number if you know the map colors or a skript/rgb color
map pixels range from 1 to 128
syntax_6604.syntax_pattern:
pixel at [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] [(of|on) %mapcanv%]
pixels (between|within) [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] and [(][x[ ]]%number%,[ ][y[ ]]%number%[)] [(of|on) %mapcanv%]
all pixels [(of|on) %mapcanv%]

en:
returns pixels of map, can be set to a number if you know the map colors or a skript/rgb color
map pixels range from 1 to 128

syntax_6584.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6584.title: Enchant display
syntax_6584.description: returns an enchantment type as a formatted string example sharpness 7 returns §7Sharpness VII

en: returns an enchantment type as a formatted string example sharpness 7 returns §7Sharpness VII

syntax_6608.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6608.title: Map States
syntax_6608.description:
returns certain map states
locked: whether the map can explore further
position tracking: whether a position cursor should be shown when the map is near its center
unlimited tracking: whether the map will show a smaller position cursor when cursor is outside of map's range

en:
returns certain map states
locked: whether the map can explore further
position tracking: whether a position cursor should be shown when the map is near its center
unlimited tracking: whether the map will show a smaller position cursor when cursor is outside of map's range

syntax_6609.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6609.title: Map World / Location
syntax_6609.description: the world / location of a map

en: the world / location of a map
the map of an item

syntax_6611.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6611.title: Movement location
syntax_6611.description: Gets the location from and location to in a player move event, can be set

en: Gets the location from and location to in a player move event, can be set

syntax_6612.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6612.title: Multiple of object
syntax_6612.description:
returns x of any object
3 times of stone would return stone, stone and stone

en:
returns x of any object
3 times of stone would return stone, stone and stone

syntax_6614.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6614.title: Nearest Entities
syntax_6614.description: get the nearest x entities to a location sorted

en: get the nearest x entities to a location sorted
creates a new map cursor

syntax_6616.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6616.title: Player Statistics
syntax_6616.description: Values for the stats that can be found under "Statistics" in the Game menu. Player kills, time played, item broken etc

en: Values for the stats that can be found under "Statistics" in the Game menu. Player kills, time played, item broken etc

syntax_6617.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6617.title: RGB of Color
syntax_6617.description: get or change the red, green, blue component or the entire rgb integer of a color

en: get or change the red, green, blue component or the entire rgb integer of a color

syntax_6618.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6618.title: Random Bounding Box Point
syntax_6618.description: returns a random point in a bounding box

en: returns a random point in a bounding box

syntax_6619.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6619.title: Ray Trace
syntax_6619.syntax_pattern:
[block] ray[ ]trace[s] (of|from) %livingentities% [using [fluid[collision][mode]] %fluidcollisionmode%][[,] [with] max %number%]
block ray[ ]trace[ starting] from %location% using %direction%[[,] [fluid[collision][mode]] %fluidcollisionmode%][[,] ((to ignore|ignoring) passable[ blocks])][[,] [with] max %number%]
ray[ ]trace [searching] for [this specific] %block% [starting] from %location% using %direction%[[,] [fluid[collision][mode]] %fluidcollisionmode%][[,] [with] max %number%]
ray[ ]trace [searching] for [this specific] %boundingbox% [starting] from %vector/location% using %direction%[[,] [with] max %number%]
entity ray[ ]trace [starting] from %location% using %direction%[[,] [with] max %number%][[,] ray[ ]size %number%][[,] filter[ing] [out] %entities%]
[generic] ray[ ]trace [starting] from %location% using %direction%[[,] [with] max %number%][[,] [fluid[collision][mode]] %fluidcollisionmode%][[,] ((to ignore|ignoring) passable[ blocks])][[, ] ray[ ]size %number%][[, ] filter[ing] [out] %entities%]

en: Starts a ray trace

syntax_6620.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6620.title: Ray Trace Results
syntax_6620.description: The results of a ray trace

en: The results of a ray trace

syntax_6623.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6623.title: Smelted
syntax_6623.description: returns smelt result of items, returns the same item if it cannot be smelted

en: returns smelt result of items, returns the same item if it cannot be smelted

syntax_6624.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6624.title: SubList
syntax_6624.syntax_pattern:
sub[ ]list of %objects% from ind(ice[s]|ex[es]) %number% to %number%
(first|last) %number% elements of %objects%

en: returns part of a list

syntax_6625.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6625.title: Text width
syntax_6625.description: returns the width of a text in pixels. returns nothing if there is invalid character

en: returns the width of a text in pixels. returns nothing if there is invalid character

syntax_6626.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6626.title: Timespan conversion
syntax_6626.description: returns a timespan in milliseconds ,ticks, seconds, minutes, hours, days, months or years

en: returns a timespan in milliseconds ,ticks, seconds, minutes, hours, days, months or years

syntax_6627.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6627.title: Toward Away Direction
syntax_6627.description: returns a direction towards or away from an entity/location

en: returns a direction towards or away from an entity/location

syntax_6628.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6628.title: Values of Type
syntax_6628.description: get all the values of a type eg. statistic, inventory type, firework type

en: get all the values of a type eg. statistic, inventory type, firework type

syntax_6629.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6629.title: Vector Min/Max/Sum
syntax_6629.description: Returns the maximum, minimum or sum of a list of vectors

en: Returns the maximum, minimum or sum of a list of vectors

syntax_6630.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6630.title: Vector from direction
syntax_6630.description: Converts a skript direction to a vector, useful if you want to manipulate a direction

en: Converts a skript direction to a vector, useful if you want to manipulate a direction

syntax_6631.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6631.title: Vector to location
syntax_6631.description: returns a location from a vector

en: returns a location from a vector

syntax_6633.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6633.title: Bounding Box
syntax_6633.description: Represents a bounding box between 2 points

en: Represents a bounding box between 2 points

syntax_6622.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6622.title: Skin of
syntax_6622.description: gets a skin from a player or skull

en: gets a skin from a player or skull

syntax_6621.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6621.title: Skin from texture
syntax_6621.description: returns a skin from a value and optional signature, signature is required for player skins but not for skulls

en: returns a skin from a value and optional signature, signature is required for player skins but not for skulls

syntax_6613.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6613.title: NameTag
syntax_6613.description: get or set the name tag of a player limit is 16 characters

en: get or set the name tag of a player limit is 16 characters

syntax_6643.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6643.title: Statistic
syntax_6643.type_usage: damage dealt, damage taken, deaths, mob kills, player kills, fish caught, animals bred, leave game, jump, drop count, drop, pickup, play one minute, total world time, walk one cm, walk on water one cm, fall one cm, sneak time, climb one cm, fly one cm, walk under water one cm, minecart one cm, boat one cm, pig one cm, horse one cm, sprint one cm, crouch one cm, aviate one cm, mine block, use item, break item, craft item, kill entity, entity killed by, time since death, talked to villager, traded with villager, cake slices eaten, cauldron filled, cauldron used, armor cleaned, banner cleaned, brewingstand interaction, beacon interaction, dropper inspected, hopper inspected, dispenser inspected, noteblock played, noteblock tuned, flower potted, trapped chest triggered, enderchest opened, item enchanted, record played, furnace interaction, crafting table interaction, chest opened, sleep in bed, shulker box opened, time since rest, swim one cm, damage dealt absorbed, damage dealt resisted, damage blocked by shield, damage absorbed, damage resisted, clean shulker box, open barrel, interact with blast furnace, interact with smoker, interact with lectern, interact with campfire, interact with cartography table, interact with loom, interact with stonecutter, bell ring, raid trigger, raid win, interact with anvil, interact with grindstone, target hit, interact with smithing table, strider one cm

en: represents a player statistic

syntax_6645.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6645.title: Map Edit
syntax_6645.description:
start editing a map. the %objects% at the end is to store the map canvas to use for editing.
specifying partially adds layer of map canvas above the others instead of overwriting them
if there is no section it will be a delayed effect and will wait until the specified map begins to render
map begins rendering when it is visible to a player eg. in their inventory or in an item frame

en:
start editing a map. the %objects% at the end is to store the map canvas to use for editing.
specifying partially adds layer of map canvas above the others instead of overwriting them
if there is no section it will be a delayed effect and will wait until the specified map begins to render
map begins rendering when it is visible to a player eg. in their inventory or in an item frame

syntax_6558.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6558.title: Color Entity Glow
syntax_6558.description:
Allows you to change the glow color of entities for specific or all players
Gets reset for players who relog
Only visible if the entity is already glowing
syntax_6558.syntax_pattern:
set glow[ing] color of %entities% to %color%[ for %players%]
(reset|delete|remove) glow[ing] color of %entities%[ for %players%]

en:
Allows you to change the glow color of entities for specific or all players
Gets reset for players who relog
Only visible if the entity is already glowing

syntax_6590.creator: MrsDarth
syntax_6590.title: Forced Item Frame
syntax_6590.description: returns an entity type allowing u to spawn an item frame without needing a block next to the spawn location

en: returns an entity type allowing u to spawn an item frame without needing a block next to the spawn location
